meaning: adj.发射中心和沿着试验航向的adv.发射中心和沿着试验航向地
examples: There wasn't any kind of dedicated place in the institution where people were coming to work every day saying, 'What can I do to help the people downrange today?'
Those numbers are rolled up from the reports we get from the folks that are downrange there.
So, even on a pixel-packed Galaxy Nexus, you still can't get a "better look" at what's downrange until you shoot the image and then review the full-resolution result.
